column1: #   slug                policy_type       horizon   ckpt                                                                              server_kind  display_label                                                       extra_env (optional, col 7)
# server_kind: lerobot | gr00t-n15 | gr00t-n16 | pi05 | xvla
# extra_env: space-separated KEY=VAL pairs that run_all_baselines.sh exports to run_one.sh.
#   STUCK_WINDOW_S=99999 STUCK_EPS_RAD=0   disable stuck detector (already auto for lerobot-act/diffusion in run_one.sh, listed here as explicit single-source-of-truth)
#   STEP_HZ=60                              GR00T family — 30Hz dataset but chunked output expects 60Hz playback
#   PROMPT='Grab orange and place into plate'    custom language instruction
#   - horizon 必须 per-ckpt sweep 实测，不能套统一公式 — train chunk_size 是上限不是 best
#   - 各模型 best horizon 来自 2026-05-21 5-round sweep（详见 README.html §6）
#   - SmolVLA self: main branch 现为 step-15000 (sweep best, 8/15 oranges)；30k 在 ckpt-30k 分支
#   - 老 ACT row 之前 h=32 work / h=16 卡死的实测在 2026-05-21 sweep 后改写为 h=70

column6: π0.5 PyTorch expert-FT ckpt-2000 (4B base + 693M expert, freeze VLM)
